title: dianthus × ebneri
intro: Dianthus × ebneri, also known as Ebner's Pink, is a hybrid plant within the Dianthus genus, characterized by its vibrant pink flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues and menstrual problems, due to its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dianthus × ebneri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and lower blood pressure. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular choice among herbalists for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
